name: sentience
description: Sentience — Autonomous AI Agent Wallets for Solana

scripts.dev: concurrently --names SERVER,CLIENT --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.start: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx ts-node src/dashboard.ts
scripts.start:sim: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node dashboard/server.js
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
